name: playground
description: Creates interactive HTML playgrounds: self-contained single-file explorers with visual controls, live preview, and copyable prompt output.

interface.shortDescription: Build interactive single-file HTML explorers with live previews and prompt output.
interface.longDescription: Creates self-contained HTML playgrounds with controls, live preview, presets, and a copyable natural-language prompt. Useful for design, data, concept mapping, document critique, code review, and code architecture exploration.
defaultPrompt: Make an interactive playground for this idea.
Create a visual explorer with live controls.
Build a single-file HTML prompt playground.
